changeSet.author: jordi.jaspers
changeSet.comment: Create notification_broadcast table for broadcast notifications.
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE notification_broadcast ( id BIGINT GENERATED ALWAYS AS IDENTITY PRIMARY KEY, sent_by BIGINT REFERENCES "user"(id), audience_type VARCHAR(40) NOT NULL, audience_target_id BIGINT, audience_role VARCHAR(40), category VARCHAR(40) NOT NULL, title VARCHAR(120) NOT NULL, message VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL, action_url VARCHAR(500), action_label VARCHAR(100), recipient_count INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now() );

changeSet.author: jordi.jaspers
changeSet.comment: Create notification table for per-user notifications.
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE notification ( id BIGINT GENERATED ALWAYS AS IDENTITY PRIMARY KEY, user_id BIGINT NOT NULL REFERENCES "user"(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, broadcast_id BIGINT REFERENCES notification_broadcast(id), category VARCHAR(40) NOT NULL, title VARCHAR(120) NOT NULL, message VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL, action_url VARCHAR(500), action_label VARCHAR(100), urgent BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), read_at TIMESTAMPTZ ); CREATE INDEX idx_notification_user_created ON notification(user_id, created_at DESC); CREATE INDEX idx_notification_user_unread ON notification(user_id) WHERE read_at IS NULL;
